Table	Create Table
orders	CREATE TABLE `orders` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `orderNumber` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `customerId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `totalAmount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','confirmed','processing','shipped','delivered','cancelled') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `orderDate` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `shippingAddress` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `customerName` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(10) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'USD',
  `exchangeRate` decimal(10,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `paymentStatus` enum('unpaid','partial','paid','refunded') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'unpaid',
  `paymentMethod` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `paymentTerms` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `expectedDeliveryDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `actualDeliveryDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `shippingMethod` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `trackingNumber` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `billingAddress` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `contactPerson` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `contactPhone` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `contactEmail` varchar(320) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `priority` enum('low','normal','high','urgent') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'normal',
  `source` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `orders_orderNumber_unique` (`orderNumber`),
  KEY `orders_customerId_customers_id_fk` (`customerId`),
  KEY `orders_createdBy_users_id_fk` (`createdBy`),
  CONSTRAINT `orders_customerId_customers_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`customerId`) REFERENCES `5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8`.`customers` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION,
  CONSTRAINT `orders_createdBy_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`createdBy`) REFERENCES `5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8`.`users` (`id`) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
